title: zinnia ghiesbreghtii
intro: Zinnia ghiesbreghtii, also known as the Mexican zinnia or Mexican dahlia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Zinnia ghiesbreghtii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and even help manage diabetes and hypertension. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
